summary: Decent performance with solid sound despite some clipping concerns in the audience recording.
review: The show is regarded as a good, hot set that isn’t an all‑time favorite but still enjoyable. Opinions on the source are split – some praise its balance and lack of over‑saturation, while others criticize clipping and consider it inferior to other available tapes.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviewers are divided: two give high marks for the performance (4‑5 stars) while two rate the recording poorly (0‑1 star). Weighted averaging of show vs. recording quality yields a mid‑range rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Some listeners note clipping and inferiority compared to other sources; others find the balance good with enough Phil without drowning out other instruments.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Generally described as a solid, hot show but not highlighted as an all‑time classic.

band_member_comments.Phil: Described as "enough Phil without saturating the other voices and instruments out of existence" – praised for balanced bass presence.
